rules: No Inter or Roboto allowed anywhere.
Headings must use tight tracking (tracking-tight) to feel tactical and precise.
Overlines and table headers must be uppercase, tiny (text-xs), and wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Panic button text must be text-4xl to text-6xl, uppercase, Anton font.

admin_dashboard.panels: h-full border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900 rounded-lg p-4 md:p-6
admin_dashboard.rules: Every pixel utilized. Pure black/dark slate cards with 1px borders. No soft/fuzzy shadows. Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes or 2px 'Inner Glow' highlights (shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]).

client_pwa.classes: flex flex-col h-screen max-h-[100dvh] overflow-hidden bg-zinc-950 p-4
client_pwa.rules: Mobile-first approach. Content must be perfectly centered visually. Generous spacing around the red panic button to avoid accidental taps.

panic_button.classes: relative z-10 w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-rose-600 text-white font-display text-5xl uppercase tracking-widest shadow-[0_0_64px_rgba(225,29,72,0.4)] active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-100 flex items-center justify-center border-4 border-rose-500
panic_button.ripple_effect: Add concentric animated ring layers behind the button using absolute positioning and ping/pulse animations to simulate signal broadcast.

tables.header_classes: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-400 border-b border-zinc-800 pb-2

alert_feed.item_classes: p-3 border-l-4 border-rose-600 bg-zinc-900 rounded-r-md flex flex-col gap-1

motion.feed_entrance: Staggered fade-in from the right (translate-x-4 to translate-x-0) for new alerts.
motion.panic_trigger: When panic button is pressed, screen flash effect (bg-white/10 inset-0 absolute) and a 0.5s screen shake animation.

image_urls.description: Dark, moody abstract background with subtle light streaks. Use for Admin and Client login screens with a bg-zinc-950/80 overlay.
White snowy owl with yellow eyes. Use this as a placeholder avatar for the Super Admin, or as a subtle watermark graphic in the empty state of the dashboard.
Dark night city aerial view. Use as a background pattern or placeholder if Leaflet map fails to load.
Red alarm. Use for 404 pages or empty 'No Alerts' states.

icons.rules: Use strokeWidth={1.5} for a crisper, more technical look. Icons must match text color exactly.

general: Strictly implement the dark theme. No light mode toggle needed. The entire system is built for low-light command centers and high-contrast mobile visibility.
Use Shadcn UI extensively for the Admin Dashboard (Tables, Dialogs, Select, Tabs, Forms). Override the default Shadcn radius to `rounded-sm` or `rounded-none` to fit the tactical aesthetic.
Forms (Client & Admin) MUST use Shadcn Form, Input, and Textarea components, stylized with border-zinc-800 and bg-zinc-900/50.
Client PWA requires a fixed bottom navigation or fixed header. The main interaction (Panic Button) must not be obscured by scrolling.
Embed Google Fonts manually in index.css: Cabinet Grotesk (headings), IBM Plex Sans (body), Anton (display).
client_pwa: The 'Silent Alert' must be a single-tap action (no confirmation dialogue) to ensure immediate dispatch. Give a subtle toast notification 'Alert sent silently'.
The 'Normal Alert' must open a full-screen drawer/modal (Shadcn Dialog or Drawer) containing a form for Text, Image Upload, and Audio recording.
Ensure the PWA is visually centered vertically and horizontally.
admin_panel: Alert Feed must be sticky on the right sidebar or prominently placed. Incoming alerts should trigger an HTML5 Audio beep (use a base64 string or public URL for the beep).
Map Integration: Use `react-leaflet` with `TileLayer` pointing to the CartoDB Dark Matter URL specified in the components section.
Implement Chart.js or Recharts for 'Alerts Today/Week/Month'. Charts must use the specific hex colors from the palette (rose-600, amber-500, emerald-500).
testing: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="panic-button"`, `data-testid="alert-row"`).
